name: Smiley Face Killers: The Hunt for Justice
original_name: Smiley Face Killers: The Hunt for Justice
overview: Are the deaths of hundred of young men the result of a single killer, a gang of homicidal psychopaths or merely accidents? Is there a national murder conspiracy hiding in plain sight, or is the whole scenario a series of coincidences? A myth? These are the questions surrounding the Smiley Face Killings.

trailers.title: Smiley Face Killers: Proving Homicide First | Oxygen
